title: Tsunami -- Follow up
content:
The numbers were climbing rapidly today. The latest number in Thailand is very closed to 1,000 and almost 25,000 all over South -East- Asia +and part of Africa (Somalia)+. Many more are still missing.

My deepest condolence to the family of those who lost their life and my prayer to those who survived.

("CNN":http://www.cnn.com/2004/WORLD/asiapcf/12/27/asia.quake/index.html / "BBC":http://news.bbc.co.uk/1/hi/in_depth/world/2004/asia_quake_disaster/default.stm / "คม ชัด ลึก":http://202.60.196.117/2004/special/sunami/)

%(source)"soft jesus" photo (header) from "sxc.hu":http://sxc.hu/browse.phtml?f=view&id=191977%

h3. Update 12/29

According to many news agency, the death toll has reached somewhere between 45,000 to 50,000. In Southern Thailand, many parts are still inaccessible to rescuers and many people are still missing.

h3. That's it for this year

I guess this is the end of this year's TBOX. Thank you all for participating. It's been a lot of fun. It's very unfortunate that the year ends with such a great tragedy. But anyhow, we'll have to find someway to move on.

I'll see you again in 2005. (Rite?) Wish you all a successful and happy new year.

Take care.
